---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose a new platform capability or standardization
title: '[FEAT]: '
labels: enhancement, RFC
---

## 💡 Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? (e.g., "The Denmark team needs a new telemetry format for EuroGrid.")

## 🛠 Proposed Solution
How should the platform evolve to support this? Include any required **Schema Changes**.

## 🏗 Architectural Impact
- [ ] Requires Avro Schema evolution
- [ ] Impact on existing Helm chart templates
- [ ] Changes to shared CI/CD workflows
- [ ] New SLOs/Metrics required

## 🌍 Stakeholders
Which teams are affected by this? (e.g., AutoGrid, Kraken, Data Science)

## ✅ Success Criteria
How do we know this is successful? (e.g., "Reduces ingestion latency for Danish substation data by 200ms.")
